siteSettings.name: Authentication/Registration/Enabled
siteSettings.purpose: Keep the R3.1 proof anonymous rather than user-registered.

siteSettings.name: Webapi/dbm_request/enabled
siteSettings.purpose: Allow the portal proof shell to create, update, and refresh request rows.

siteSettings.name: Webapi/dbm_request/fields
siteSettings.purpose: Limit the anonymous proof path to the request capture and runtime fields needed by R3.1.

siteSettings.name: dbm/portal-runtime/anonymous-readback-enabled
siteSettings.purpose: Make the Dev-only anonymous status refresh posture explicit.
